hooks.prompt: A subagent just finished. Before you treat its findings as true or act on them, apply the `verified-delegation` skill: extract each cited claim and independently re-check its citation (re-read the file:line, or re-run the command) using the claim-verifier agent. Act only on confirmed claims; halt on any contradicted one. Skip this only for trivial, read-only summaries where being wrong costs nothing.
